description: A general contractor receives a notice from a sub-subcontractor that they have not been paid by the subcontractor. The GC must now take action to ensure payment.

nodes.task_description: Log the receipt of the conditional payment notice.

expected_outcome.value: The notice is formally logged in the project's legal correspondence file.

nodes.task_description: Place a temporary hold on future payments to the subcontractor in question.

expected_outcome.value: A payment hold is successfully placed in the accounting system.

nodes.task_description: Contact the subcontractor to demand proof of payment to their sub-subcontractor.

expected_outcome.value: A formal communication is sent to the subcontractor to resolve the issue.
